name: aiap_creator
description: AIAP Creator — 18-stage pipeline for creating, evolving, validating, simulating, and managing AIAP programs. 15 modules, 213 nodes, 1167 scenarios (A-AJ). Pattern D orchestrator with sub_mermaid delegation. Grade S (4.993). Supports Create/Evolve/Modify/Validate/Simulate/Compare/Discover/Deprecate/Export/Import/Explain/Package/Convert workflows. ThreeDimTest quality scoring, governance hash canonical v1.0. v2.29.0: ReviewFinalize evolution finalization, governance_hash TRI-SYNC verified.

skills.name: Create
skills.description: Create a new AIAP program from scratch via the full 18-stage pipeline (Research -> Evolve -> Generate -> Modify -> QualityGate -> Validate -> Simulate -> PostSimulateGate -> Observability -> ReviewPresent -> ReviewFinalize).

skills.name: Evolve
skills.description: Evolve an existing AIAP program to a next-gen version with new capabilities, using the full pipeline with incremental diff analysis.

skills.name: Modify
skills.description: Within-version patch, quality improvement, or bug fix on a specific module via a shorter pipeline (Research(quality) -> Modify -> Generate -> Validate -> Review).

skills.name: Validate
skills.description: Structural and quality check of an existing AIAP program using ThreeDimTest with 33+ checks (C1-C7, I1-I13, D1-D10) and MF1-MF27 multi-file audit. Includes score trajectory analysis with per-dimension root-cause annotation. Standalone read-only operation.

skills.name: Simulate
skills.description: Dry-run execution path tracing and scenario coverage analysis of an existing AIAP program (Categories A-X, including multi-mechanism interaction, async delegation race detection, CREATE mode enhancement, INSIGHTS mechanism scenarios, and Insights Lifecycle scenarios). Standalone read-only operation.

skills.name: Compare
skills.description: Side-by-side diff comparison of two AIAP program versions or two different AIAP programs, generating a structured diff report.

skills.name: Discover
skills.description: Search for existing AIAP programs by domain or keyword via workspace scan, federated registry query, and semantic matching with related recommendations.

skills.name: Deprecate
skills.description: Mark an AIAP program as deprecated or archived, performing state transition and migration guide generation.

skills.name: Export
skills.description: Export an AIAP program to SKILL.md format with field mapping and governance metadata preservation.

skills.name: Import
skills.description: Import a SKILL.md file and generate an AIAP program skeleton with governance defaults.

skills.name: Explain
skills.description: Explain AIAP concepts, protocol rules, and program structure through inline knowledge responses.

skills.name: Package
skills.description: Pack an AIAP program into a .aiap archive for distribution, or unpack and verify a .aiap archive.

skills.name: Convert
skills.description: Convert an AIAP program flow topology between Mermaid and JSON flow dict representations with auto-direction detection, §4 topology transformation, migration manifest, and round-trip verification.

skills.name: General
skills.description: Handle general queries and other requests not matching specific intents, with proactive suggestions.

cardSignature: PLACEHOLDER — T4 A2A compliance: populate with JWS/JWK signature when T4 signing infrastructure is available. Tracked as future enhancement per A2A v1.2 (Linux Foundation AAIF, 150+ members, 5 SDKs, production deployments). Implementation deferred until T4 JWS key management ecosystem matures.

content_policies: Generated AIAP programs must declare axiom_0 (Human Sovereignty and Wellbeing)
Programs with trust_level >= 3 require explicit user confirmation for destructive operations
No program may bypass sys.io.confirm gates or auto-approve on behalf of user
All generated programs must include safety_card with risk_level and limitations
alignment_measures: Axiom 0 enforcement at every pipeline stage via [ASSERT] gates
WAITING_USER gate in EvolveStep prevents autonomous evolution decisions
Layer 3 validators provide closed-loop verification of all pipeline outputs
ThreeDimTest I2 (security) dimension scored independently with dimension floor

data_handling.encryption: workspace files stored as plaintext; no PII collected; encryption delegated to OS-level filesystem encryption if configured
data_handling.erasure_policy: workspace files can be deleted by user at any time; no remote data storage; .evolution_snapshot/ provides rollback capability
data_handling.data_minimization: program operates only on explicitly provided workspace_dir; no telemetry or usage data collected outside workspace

limitations: File system write scope limited to workspace_dir
Cannot directly execute AIAP programs (SoulBot executor responsibility)
All programs use Mermaid flow format (.aisop.json)
